overall.description: A first-person vehicle drive through a futuristic cyberpunk city highway from the game Cyberpunk 2077. The camera moves steadily through multi-level highway interchanges, passing under overpasses with large billboards and alongside a distinctive green construction tower, with moderate futuristic traffic and dense urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane futuristic highway with elevated transit rail

events.description: passing under the highway overpass, entering shadow beneath the structure

agents.ego_description: driving forward on the highway approaching an overpass with large billboards

notable_agents.action: dark SUV driving ahead in the right lane

entered.detail: tall skyscraper under construction covered in green scaffolding with orange structural accents
elevated highway structure featuring large advertisements including Watson Whore billboard
green elevated monorail track running parallel to the highway
concrete and metal lane divider with yellow and black hazard stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic multi-lane highway with a distinctive green construction tower dominating the left skyline. The camera approaches an overpass structure adorned with billboards while driving alongside other vehicles. The elevated transit rail runs parallel on the right as the vehicle enters the shadow of the approaching overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with construction site on left and dense city ahead

events.description: exiting the shadow of the overpass back into daylight
slight curve to the left as the highway bends around the construction site

agents.ego_description: continuing along the highway passing other vehicles with the green construction tower dominating the left side

notable_agents.action: silver sedan overtaking in the left lane
brown van maintaining speed in the right lane

entered.detail: futuristic glass and steel building complex with geometric architecture visible ahead in the distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the overpass, the scene opens into bright daylight with the massive green construction tower now closer on the left. The highway curves gently as vehicles overtake and merge. In the distance, a futuristic glass complex rises at the center of the skyline, becoming the new focal point ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway interchange with multiple levels and support pillars

events.description: large concrete support pillar passes close on the left side temporarily blocking view
entering the multi-level highway interchange with stacked overpasses visible ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the highway interchange with multiple overpasses and ramps visible while maintaining speed

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving ahead under the overpass structure

entered.detail: massive concrete pillar with yellow safety padding at the base supporting the overhead highway
multiple levels of intersecting highway ramps and overpasses creating a complex vertical structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle moves through a complex highway interchange, passing close to a massive concrete support pillar. The green construction tower recedes behind as the road enters a denser urban core with stacked highway levels. The central glass complex grows larger ahead while futuristic residential towers appear on the right skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level highway interchange with dense futuristic architecture

events.description: passing under second major overpass, increased shadow and darker lighting conditions
vehicles merging from left ramp into the main highway flow

agents.ego_description: driving through the dense urban highway core with towering buildings on both sides and multiple traffic lanes merging

notable_agents.action: green sports car merging from the left ramp into traffic
black sedan maintaining speed in the right lane alongside the camera

entered.detail: solid concrete highway deck passing directly overhead blocking most of the sky
tall pink and grey residential towers with external balconies and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The final segment drives through a dense multi-level highway corridor with solid overpass decks blocking the sky above. The central glass complex now looms large directly ahead while traffic density increases with vehicles merging from ramps. Futuristic residential towers line the right side as the vehicle maintains speed through the sheltered urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a futuristic highway that transitions from an open industrial skyline into a dense, sheltered urban canyon. It begins on a multi-lane road dominated by a massive green construction tower on the left, moving past an elevated transit rail and under a billboard-adorned overpass. As the vehicle emerges from the shadow into bright daylight, the highway curves gently toward a distant glass complex that becomes the new focal point of the horizon. The scene then shifts through a complex interchange, passing a massive concrete support pillar as the green tower recedes and the road enters a denser core of stacked highway levels and residential towers. Finally, the camera drives into a multi-level corridor where solid overpass decks block the sky, leaving the vehicle to speed through a sheltered canyon of skyscrapers with the central glass complex looming large directly ahead.
